doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document grossly misstates Illinois eviction law (a 5-day notice allows cure by payment and requires court proceedings) and invents a non-existent HUD/Illinois AG joint publication.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document misstates Illinois eviction law (a 5-day notice gives a right to cure by paying, and a court eviction proceeding is required) and fabricates a HUD/AG joint publication that does not exist.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document grossly misstates Illinois eviction law (a 5-day notice allows cure by payment and requires court proceedings) and invents a non-existent HUD/Illinois AG joint publication.
